Title: Create Plant Record
Test Steps:
1. Invoke create() method on DataManager with provided data.
2. Verify that the record is created successfully.
Expected Result: Plant record with id=1, plantName="Rose", plantType="Flower" is created in the database.

Title: Read Plant Record
Test Steps:
1. Invoke read() method on DataManager with id=1.
2. Verify that the correct plant record is returned.
Expected Result: Plant record with id=1, plantName="Rose", plantType="Flower" is returned.

Title: Update Plant Record
Test Steps:
1. Invoke update() method on DataManager with updated data.
2. Verify that the record is updated successfully.
Expected Result: Plant record with id=1, plantName="Tulip", plantType="Flower" is updated in the database.

Title: Delete Plant Record
Test Steps:
1. Invoke delete() method on DataManager with id=1.
2. Verify that the record is deleted successfully.
Expected Result: Plant record with id=1 is deleted from the database.

2. Click on the take photo button.
3. Verify that the photo is taken and saved.

Title: Sign Out
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Authentication page.
2. Click on the sign out button.
3. Verify that the user is signed out.
Expected Result: User is signed out successfully.

Title: Ask Text Query
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Gemini AI page.
2. Enter the query "What is the weather today?".
3. Submit the query.
4. Verify that the response is received.
Expected Result: Response to the query is received and displayed.

Title: Ask Text Query with Image
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Gemini AI page.
2. Upload an image.
3. Enter the query "Identify this plant".
4. Submit the query.
5. Verify that the response is received.
Expected Result: Response to the query is received and displayed along with the uploaded image.

Title: Set Preference
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Shared Preference page.
2. Set the preference "dark_mode=true".
3. Verify that the preference is set successfully.
Expected Result: Preference "dark_mode=true" is set successfully.

Title: Upload Image
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Firebase/Storage/Manager page.
2. Upload an image.
3. Verify that the image is uploaded successfully.
Expected Result: Image is uploaded successfully and the URL is returned.

Title: Request Token
Test Steps:
1. Main component requests token.
2. LocalUser component receives token request.
3. LocalUser component sends token request to Authentication component.
4. Authentication component processes token request and sends token back to LocalUser component.
5. LocalUser component sends token back to Main component.
6. Main component confirms completion of authentication process.
Expected Result: Token is successfully requested and authentication process is completed.

Title: Upload New Species Photo
Test Steps:
1. Main component initiates new photo upload.
2. Main component sends new photo to Gemini AI API for species identification.
3. Gemini AI API identifies the species and returns the result.
4. Main component inserts the identified species into Firebase Storage.
5. Main component confirms the insertion.
6. Main component uploads the new photo to the correct folder in Firebase Storage.
7. Main component downloads the URL of the uploaded photo.
Expected Result: New species photo is uploaded successfully, species is identified, and URL is downloaded.

Title: Request Personal Storage
Test Steps:
1. Main component requests personal storage from Firebase Storage.
2. Firebase Storage provides personal storage details.
3. Main component requests photos for each species present.
4. Firebase Storage provides URLs for each requested photo.
Expected Result: Personal storage details and photo URLs are retrieved successfully.

Title: Request Photos for Each Species
Preconditions: User is authenticated, personal storage details are available
Test Steps:
1. Main component requests photos for each species present from Firebase Storage.
2. Firebase Storage provides URLs for each requested photo.
Expected Result: URLs for each requested photo are retrieved successfully.

Title: Download Photo URLs
Preconditions: User is authenticated, personal storage details and photo URLs are available
Test Steps: 1. Main component downloads the URLs of each requested photo from Firebase Storage.
Expected Result: Photo URLs are downloaded successfully.

Title: Invalid Token Request
Test Steps:
1. Main component requests token.
2. LocalUser component receives token request.
3. LocalUser component sends invalid token request to Authentication component.
4. Authentication component rejects the invalid token request.
5. LocalUser component reports failure to Main component.
Expected Result: Token request fails due to invalid token.

Title: Failed Species Identification
Test Steps:
1. Main component initiates new photo upload.
2. Main component sends new photo to Gemini AI API for species identification.
3. Gemini AI API fails to identify the species.
4. Main component handles the failure and reports it.
Expected Result: Species identification fails and error is reported.
